app.name: NextMail
app.tagline: A focused, dependable desktop email experience

common.unexpectedError: The operation could not be completed. Please try again.

onboarding.welcomeTitle: Start with a secure, focused place for email
onboarding.welcomeDescription: Choose where your mail data lives, then connect your first account. Once it is verified, NextMail is ready to use.
onboarding.welcomeLocalDescription: Messages and attachments live in the local folder you choose, ready to back up or move as one dataset.
onboarding.welcomePrivacyDescription: Your password is stored only in the system credential store, separate from the portable mail data folder.
onboarding.dataDescription: Messages, attachments, drafts, templates, and signatures will live here. Account settings and passwords always stay outside this folder.
onboarding.dataHint: Choose an empty folder or an existing NextMail data folder. Always quit the app before moving it.
onboarding.existingDataset: A compatible NextMail data folder was found.
onboarding.newDataset: The folder is ready for a new mail dataset.
onboarding.missingTitle: Your mail data folder is unavailable
onboarding.missingDescription: It may have been moved or disconnected. Choose its new location to continue.
onboarding.accountDescription: NextMail will verify IMAP and SMTP without sending mail or changing anything on the server.
onboarding.passwordHint: Your password goes directly to the system credential store and is never saved in the mail data folder.
onboarding.manualDescription: Confirm the host, port, encryption method, and username with your email provider.
onboarding.insecureTitle: This configuration includes an unencrypted connection
onboarding.insecureDescription: Your username, password, and mail content may travel over the network in plain text. Only use this on a server and network you trust.
onboarding.insecureAcknowledge: I understand the risk and allow the unencrypted connection
onboarding.privacyNote: NextMail does not upload account settings or log passwords and raw server responses.

mail.notSynced: Mail has not been synced yet
mail.notSyncedDescription: Your account is securely connected. Messages will appear here after syncing begins.
mail.noMessagesDescription: Messages will appear here after they are synchronized.
mail.noSearchResultsDescription: Try another subject, sender, or message-preview keyword.
mail.syncActionFailed: A local action could not be synchronized to the server.
mail.serverCleanupPending: The server cannot safely expunge by UID. The message is marked deleted and will be cleaned up later by the server or another client.
mail.receiveDisabledHint: Receiving mail will be enabled with the complete sync controls
mail.composeDisabledHint: Composing will be enabled in the writing stage
mail.bodyUnavailable: The message body has not been downloaded
mail.bodyUnavailableDescription: Bodies outside the current sync range will appear after an on-demand download.
mail.remoteImagesBlockedDescription: NextMail did not request remote images in this message to protect your privacy.
mail.attachmentReady: Saved in the NextMail data folder

composer.subject: Subject
composer.recipientPlaceholder: name@example.com; separate addresses with commas or semicolons
composer.queued: The message is safely queued for delivery.
composer.preparing: Saving the draft and preparing the message…
composer.sendFailedDescription: The message and its attachments are still safely stored locally. You can retry.
composer.emptySubjectDescription: This message has no subject. You can still send it.
composer.confirmDeleteDraft: Click again to delete this draft

settings.title: Settings
settings.noOptionsDescription: Options will appear here when the related feature can be configured.
settings.autoLoadRemoteImagesDescription: Remote images may tell senders when and where a message was opened. This preference applies to every message on this device.
settings.autoOpenDownloadedAttachmentsDescription: When disabled, the first click only downloads the attachment; click it again to open it with the system default app. High-risk files are always revealed in their folder instead.

categoryDescription.general: Choose the interface language and general behavior.
categoryDescription.appearance: Adjust the interface theme and accent color.
categoryDescription.accounts: Add, switch, and manage account connections and synchronization.
categoryDescription.composer: Manage default composing and editor preferences.
categoryDescription.advanced: Review storage, connection, and advanced runtime options.
categoryDescription.about: View the NextMail version and product information.

accounts.noAccountDescription: Add an IMAP/SMTP password account to continue using this local mail workspace.
accounts.reauthenticateDescription: Enter a new password or app password. Background synchronization resumes as soon as both connections are verified.
accounts.newPasswordHint: Leave this blank to verify the connection with the existing password in the system credential store.
accounts.removeWarning: Local mail data will be retained
accounts.removeDescription: The account settings and system credential will be removed from this device. Anonymous mail data and {{drafts}} local drafts remain in the data folder.
accounts.removeBlocked: This account cannot be removed yet
accounts.removeBlockedDescription: Resolve {{jobs}} queued send jobs and {{operations}} pending server operations first.
accounts.folderMappingsDescription: NextMail archives sent mail, syncs drafts, deletes, or archives only after an explicit mapping, avoiding incorrect folder guesses.
accounts.title: Account management
accounts.description: Review the current account connection, runtime, and local sync status.
accounts.syncPending: Waiting for the first mail sync

sync.failedDescription: Local mail remains available. NextMail will retry on the next launch.

about.title: About NextMail
about.description: A focused, secure desktop mail client designed for offline use.

errors.title: Unable to complete the operation
errors.data_directory.absolute_path_required: Enter the full path to a data folder.
errors.data_directory.path_is_file: The selected path is a file. Choose a folder instead.
errors.data_directory.not_empty: This folder contains other files. Choose an empty folder or a NextMail data folder.
errors.data_directory.unreadable: NextMail cannot read this folder. Check its permissions.
errors.data_directory.incompatible_dataset: The NextMail data in this folder is incompatible or damaged.
errors.data_directory.create_failed: NextMail cannot create this data folder. Check the path and permissions.
errors.data_directory.database_open_failed: NextMail cannot create the mail database in this folder.
errors.data_directory.database_migration_failed: The mail database could not be initialized.
errors.data_directory.marker_write_failed: The data folder marker could not be written.
errors.data_directory.missing: The mail data folder is unavailable. Choose it again.
errors.account.discovery_not_found: Reliable automatic settings were not found. Enter the server settings manually.
errors.account.password_required: Enter your password or app password.
errors.account.server_config_invalid: The server settings are incomplete. Check the address, port, and username.
errors.account.insecure_acknowledgement_require: Acknowledge the risk of the unencrypted connection first.
errors.account.imap_connection_failed: NextMail could not connect to the IMAP server.
errors.account.imap_tls_failed: The secure IMAP connection failed. Check the server name and certificate.
errors.account.imap_starttls_failed: The IMAP server could not establish STARTTLS.
errors.account.imap_authentication_failed: IMAP authentication failed. Check the username and password.
errors.account.smtp_authentication_failed: SMTP authentication failed. Check the username, password, and security setting.
errors.account.duplicate: An account with the same email address, IMAP server, port, and username already exists.
errors.account.not_found: This email account could not be found.
errors.account.runtime_stopped: The account background service is not running yet. Try again shortly.
errors.account.removing: This account is being removed and cannot accept new changes.
errors.account.remove_blocked: This account still has queued mail or server operations and cannot be removed yet.
errors.account.composer_close_timeout: Some composer windows could not save and close. Close them manually and try again.
errors.credential.unavailable: The system credential store is unavailable. The account was not saved.
errors.credential.write_failed: The password could not be written to the system credential store.
errors.credential.read_failed: The account password could not be read from the system credential store. Reauthenticate the account.
errors.credential.delete_failed: The account was removed. NextMail will retry cleaning its system credential later.
errors.storage.accounts_write_failed: The account settings could not be saved.
errors.storage.bootstrap_write_failed: The setup settings could not be saved.
errors.storage.reading_preferences_corrupt: Reading preferences could not be read.
errors.storage.reading_preferences_write_failed: Reading preferences could not be saved.
errors.sync.imap_connection_failed: NextMail could not connect to the IMAP server. Check your network and try again.
errors.sync.imap_authentication_failed: IMAP authentication has expired. Reauthentication will be available in account management.
errors.sync.message_body_fetch_failed: The message body could not be downloaded. Check your network and try again.
errors.sync.message_parse_failed: The message could not be parsed. NextMail will retry during a later synchronization.
errors.sync.uid_validity_changed: The server rebuilt this mail folder. Wait for the next synchronization to finish.
errors.sync.message_not_found: This message is no longer available on the server.
errors.sync.idle_failed: Real-time mail monitoring disconnected. NextMail will reconnect automatically.
errors.sync.flags_fetch_failed: Message state could not be read from the server. NextMail will retry automatically.
errors.operation.same_mailbox: The source and destination folders must be different.
errors.operation.store_failed: The message state could not be updated on the server.
errors.operation.flag_conflict: Another client changed the message at the same time. NextMail will reconcile it again.
errors.operation.message_missing: The message for this action no longer exists on the server.
errors.operation.copy_failed: The message could not be copied on the server.
errors.operation.move_failed: The message could not be moved on the server.
errors.operation.expunge_failed: The server could not safely clean up the deleted message.
errors.operation.append_failed: The message could not be saved to the server folder.
errors.mailbox.trash_not_mapped: Choose a Trash folder in account management first.
errors.mailbox.archive_not_mapped: Choose an Archive folder in account management first.
errors.mailbox.role_mapping_failed: The system folder mapping could not be saved.
errors.message.remote_location_missing: The server location for this message is unavailable.
errors.message.raw_unavailable: The raw message is currently unavailable.
errors.message.not_found: This message could not be found. It may have been moved or deleted.
errors.attachment.not_found: This attachment could not be found.
errors.attachment.read_failed: The selected attachment could not be read. Make sure it is still available.
errors.attachment.file_required: Only files can be added as attachments.
errors.attachment.too_large: An individual attachment cannot exceed 25 MB.
errors.attachment.total_too_large: Attachments for this message cannot exceed 100 MB in total.
errors.attachment.name_invalid: The attachment file name is invalid.
errors.attachment.content_unavailable: The attachment content has not been downloaded yet.
errors.attachment.content_read_failed: The downloaded attachment content could not be read.
errors.attachment.cache_directory_failed: The attachment opening cache could not be created.
errors.attachment.cache_write_failed: The attachment could not be prepared for opening.
errors.attachment.open_failed: The system could not open this attachment. No associated app may be installed.
errors.attachment.reveal_failed: The attachment could not be shown in its system folder.
errors.attachment.save_dialog_failed: The attachment save dialog could not be opened.
errors.attachment.save_path_invalid: The selected attachment save location is invalid.
errors.attachment.save_failed: The attachment could not be saved to the selected location.
errors.draft.revision_conflict: This draft changed in another window. Close this window and open it again.
errors.draft.not_editable: This draft is already in the send queue and can no longer be changed.
errors.draft.window_open: Close the composer window for this draft before deleting it.
errors.draft.delete_failed: This draft could not be deleted. Try again.
errors.draft.import_failed: The server draft could not be converted into an editable draft.
errors.draft.create_from_message_failed: A reply or forwarding draft could not be created from this message.
errors.draft.editor_json_invalid: The editor content could not be saved. Try again.
errors.composer.window_create_failed: The composer window could not be opened. Try again.
errors.settings.window_create_failed: The settings window could not be opened. Try again.
errors.send.recipient_required: Add at least one To, Cc, or Bcc recipient.
errors.send.recipient_invalid: One or more email addresses are invalid. Check the recipients.
errors.send.smtp_timeout: The outgoing server timed out. Your message is still stored locally.
errors.send.smtp_temporary_failure: The outgoing server is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
errors.send.smtp_authentication_failed: SMTP authentication failed. Revalidate the account in account management.
errors.send.smtp_rejected: The outgoing server rejected this message.
errors.send.mime_build_failed: A standard email message could not be generated. Check the body and attachments and try again.
errors.common.unexpected_error: The operation could not be completed. Please try again.
